channel.title: Microfoam on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Microfoam on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Milk Steaming Techniques: Microfoam Methodology and Latte Art Pour Guide
item.description: Master microfoam — the iterative methodology of milk steaming, with diagnostic tables, the 3-phase protocol, and a heart-tulip-rosetta pour progression.
